title: Validate token signature and claims
description: JWTs are verified for signature, issuer, audience, and expiry before any claim is trusted; alg is pinned.
body: Use when consuming a JWT or any signed token. Do not decode-without-verify or accept the token's own alg header (alg:none / confusion). Actions: verify signature against the expected key, pin the algorithm, check iss/aud/exp/nbf, and only then read claims. Validation signals include tests for tampered signature, wrong issuer/audience, expired token, and alg:none all rejected. Risk boundary: trusting an unverified claim (especially role/scope) is a critical finding.
